title: Cobblemon Holiday Pokeballs
description: Valentine's Day Themed Pokeball Resource Pack for Cobblemon! Works for CobbleLoots Loot Balls too!
body:
Celebrate the holidays in Cobblemon with this festive **Pokéballs Resource Pack!** This pack reskins **20-30 Pokéballs** with fun Christmas-themed designs while keeping their functionality exactly the same!

🎄 Christmas Features:

27 Pokéballs reskinned with holiday designs
Fully compatible with Cobblemon and Cobble Loots Lootballs
Ideal for players who want a holiday-themed reskin without changing the rest of their game

💘 Valentines Features: 

31 Pokéballs reskinned with colorful Valentine's day designs
Fully compatible with Cobblemon and Cobble Loots Lootballs
Ideal for players who want a holiday-themed reskin without changing the rest of their game

💡 Notes:

Requires Cobblemon to see the reskins
Supports CobbleLoots Loot balls 

License:
This pack is intended for personal, casual, or social media/streaming use. Using it to monetize a server or make real-world money is not allowed. If a server wants to use it commercially, you must talk to me to write a licensing agreement for your server specifically. More info in the License.txt 

Check out some of my other work! | Cobblemon: Apex Worlds | Better Shiny Mon |
